metadata.short_desc: Track group message counts with leaderboards and scheduled push
metadata.desc: Track group member message counts. Supports total/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly leaderboards, LLM title generation, and scheduled push.

theme.hint: Visual theme for the leaderboard image

auto_theme_switch.hint: Automatically switch between light/dark themes based on time

if_send_pic.hint: Image mode looks better, text mode uses less resources

timer_enabled.hint: Auto push leaderboard at scheduled time

timer_rank_type.hint: Type of leaderboard for scheduled push

milestone_enabled.hint: Auto push when user reaches milestone message count

llm_system_prompt.hint: Customize title generation style and colors

llm_min_daily_messages.hint: Users below this threshold won't get titles

llm_enable_on_manual.hint: Also generate titles on manual queries (uses Tokens)
